channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: This factory was severely short on workers. Then it offered flexible work
item.description: A GE Appliances plant in rural northwest Georgia was short hundreds of workers amid COVID-19. A flexible work option where some workers can sign up for shifts through an app has eased the pain.
item.content:encoded:
A GE Appliances plant in rural northwest Georgia was short hundreds of workers amid COVID-19. A flexible work option where some workers can sign up for shifts through an app has eased the pain.

(Image credit: Julie Holder for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Andrea Hsu

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: Trump says ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran is over, pressure mounts for Graham Platner to drop out of Maine Senate race, IOC opens door for Russian athletes to compete in 2028 Games.
item.content:encoded: Trump says ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran is over, pressure mounts for Graham Platner to drop out of Maine Senate race, IOC opens door for Russian athletes to compete in 2028 Games.
item.dc:creator: Michel Martin

item.title: Le Pen says she'll run for French presidency next year despite court-ordered monitor
item.description: Far-right leader Marine Le Pen says she'll run for the French presidency next year despite being sentenced Tuesday to wear a court-ordered electronic monitor for embezzlement.
item.content:encoded:
Far-right leader Marine Le Pen says she'll run for the French presidency next year despite being sentenced Tuesday to wear a court-ordered electronic monitor for embezzlement.

(Image credit: Aurelien Morissard)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Tehran targets Bahrain and Kuwait after U.S. strikes
item.description: The regional crossfire raised the risks that an interim agreement to halt fighting in the war could break down, putting the Middle East again at risk of a wider conflict.
item.content:encoded:
The regional crossfire raised the risks that an interim agreement to halt fighting in the war could break down, putting the Middle East again at risk of a wider conflict.

(Image credit: Hadi Mizban)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Reigning champion Argentina escapes with remarkable World Cup victory over Egypt
item.description: Egypt was leading late, up 2-0. The Argentinians looked beaten. But they fought and fought and fought. Scoring one goal, then another to equalize. And, finally, a third to advance to the quarterfinal.
item.content:encoded:
Egypt was leading late, up 2-0. The Argentinians looked beaten. But they fought and fought and fought. Scoring one goal, then another to equalize. And, finally, a third to advance to the quarterfinal.

(Image credit: Elsa)
item.dc:creator: Jasmine Garsd

item.title: International Olympic Committee lifts Russia suspension ahead of 2028 LA Games
item.description: The International Olympic Committee advised sports bodies to end a three-year program vetting Russians for neutral status ahead of qualifying events for the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics.
item.content:encoded:
The International Olympic Committee advised sports bodies to end a three-year program vetting Russians for neutral status ahead of qualifying events for the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics.

(Image credit: Cyril Zingaro)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: New lawsuit alleges U.S. shared asylum application details with Iran
item.description: A lawsuit alleges the Trump administration is divulging details of Iranian asylum seekers to the government of Iran.
item.content:encoded:
A lawsuit alleges the Trump administration is divulging details of Iranian asylum seekers to the government of Iran.

(Image credit: Anna Moneymaker)
item.dc:creator: Ximena Bustillo

item.title: There's no treatment designed for the Ebola strain ravaging DRC. But now there's hope
item.description: The strain of the virus that's responsible for the current outbreak has no specific treatments or preventive measures. Three new clinical trials could provide possible breakthroughs.
item.content:encoded:
The strain of the virus that's responsible for the current outbreak has no specific treatments or preventive measures. Three new clinical trials could provide possible breakthroughs.

(Image credit: Daniel Buuma)
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Lambert

item.title: Woman accuses Graham Platner of sexual assault. And, NATO summit begins
item.description: Graham Platner is facing calls to end his bid for U.S. Senate in Maine after a woman accused him of sexual assault. And, Trump made his dissatisfaction with NATO clear ahead of its summit this week.
item.content:encoded:
Graham Platner is facing calls to end his bid for U.S. Senate in Maine after a woman accused him of sexual assault. And, Trump made his dissatisfaction with NATO clear ahead of its summit this week.

(Image credit: CJ Gunther)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: Graham Platner faces calls to leave Maine Senate race after sexual assault allegation
item.description: Graham Platner is facing growing pressure to end his campaign for U.S. Senate in Maine after Politico reported an allegation of sexual assault. Platner has denied the claim.
item.content:encoded: Graham Platner is facing growing pressure to end his campaign for U.S. Senate in Maine after Politico reported an allegation of sexual assault. Platner has denied the claim.
item.dc:creator: Elena Moore
